entries.source: "Help me reason through this ethical dilemma without pushing me to a hidden conclusion."
entries.value: "Cabhraigh liom réasúnaíocht a dhéanamh tríd an aincheist eiticiúil seo gan mé a bhrú i dtreo conclúid fholaithe."

entries.source: "Help me understand opportunity cost by asking one question at a time."
entries.value: "Cabhraigh liom costas deise a thuiscint trí cheist amháin a chur ag an am."

entries.source: "I think I understand photosynthesis. Ask questions until you find the weak spot."
entries.value: "Sílim go dtuigim fótaisintéis. Cuir ceisteanna go dtí go bhfaighidh tú an pointe lag."

entries.source: "Make me summarize the final insight in my own words."
entries.value: "Cuir orm an léargas deiridh a achoimriú i mo chuid focal féin."

entries.source: "Test whether my argument is valid. Do not give me the answer too quickly."
entries.value: "Tástáil an bhfuil m’argóint bailí. Ná tabhair an freagra dom róthapa."

entries.source: A direct explanation can be useful. But sometimes the best way to understand an idea is to wrestle with it.
entries.value: Is féidir le míniú díreach a bheith úsáideach. Ach uaireanta is é an bealach is fearr le smaoineamh a thuiscint dul i ngleic leis.

entries.source: A Socratic tutor can surface those gaps without turning the session into a lecture.
entries.value: Is féidir le teagascóir Sócraiteach na bearnaí sin a thabhairt chun solais gan an seisiún a iompú ina léacht.

entries.source: A strong session usually has four stages.
entries.value: Bíonn ceithre chéim ag seisiún láidir de ghnáth.

entries.source: AI is well suited to patient repetition. It can ask the next question, rephrase a hint, change the difficulty, and wait while the learner tries.
entries.value: Tá IS oiriúnach go maith d’athrá foighneach. Is féidir leis an gcéad cheist eile a chur, leid a athfhriotal, an deacracht a athrú, agus fanacht fad a dhéanann an foghlaimeoir iarracht.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Teagascóir IS

entries.source: Apply the idea to a new example.
entries.value: Cuir an smaoineamh i bhfeidhm ar shampla nua.

entries.source: Can you test that idea with a simple example?
entries.value: An féidir leat an smaoineamh sin a thástáil le sampla simplí?

entries.source: critical thinking
entries.value: smaointeoireacht chriticiúil

entries.source: First, the tutor identifies the target. "I want to understand opportunity cost" is different from "I need to solve this economics homework question" or "I need to defend a position in debate." The target shapes the questions.
entries.value: Ar dtús, sainaithníonn an teagascóir an sprioc. Tá "Ba mhaith liom costas deise a thuiscint" difriúil ó "Caithfidh mé an cheist obair bhaile eacnamaíochta seo a réiteach" nó "Caithfidh mé seasamh a chosaint i ndíospóireacht." Múnlaíonn an sprioc na ceisteanna.

entries.source: For more practice, pair this with the Socratic Instruction guide, the Socratic prompts and study loop, or the broader guide on studying with AI without cheating yourself.
entries.value: Le haghaidh níos mó cleachtaidh, cuir é seo le treoir Socratic Instruction, na prasaí Sócraiteacha agus an lúb staidéir, nó an treoir níos leithne ar staidéar le IS gan caimiléireacht a dhéanamh ort féin.

entries.source: Fourth, the tutor asks one next-best question. Not five questions. Not a lecture. One move that keeps the learner thinking.
entries.value: Ar an gceathrú dul síos, cuireann an teagascóir an cheist amháin is fearr ina dhiaidh sin. Ní cúig cheist. Ní léacht. Beart amháin a choinníonn an foghlaimeoir ag smaoineamh.

entries.source: Good Socratic prompts ask:
entries.value: Iarrann prasaí Sócraiteacha maithe:

entries.source: How to know it worked
entries.value: Conas a fháil amach gur oibrigh sé

entries.source: Name the misconception or assumption that changed.
entries.value: Ainmnigh an mhíthuiscint nó an toimhde a d’athraigh.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prasaí le triail

entries.source: Questions reveal the shape of confusion. A learner might know a formula but not when to use it. They might remember a historical fact but not understand the cause. They might have a strong opinion but weak evidence.
entries.value: Nochtann ceisteanna cruth an mhearbhaill. D’fhéadfadh foirmle a bheith ar eolas ag foghlaimeoir ach gan a fhios aige cathain í a úsáid. D’fhéadfadh fíric stairiúil a bheith cuimhne aige ach gan an chúis a thuiscint. D’fhéadfadh tuairim láidir a bheith aige ach fianaise lag.

entries.source: Second, the tutor asks a diagnostic question. It should be simple enough to answer but revealing enough to expose the learner's current model.
entries.value: Ar an dara dul síos, cuireann an teagascóir ceist dhiagnóiseach. Ba chóir di a bheith sách simplí le freagairt ach sách nochtach chun samhail reatha an fhoghlaimeora a léiriú.

entries.source: Socratic learning
entries.value: Foghlaim Sócraiteach

entries.source: Socratic tutoring is not always the answer. If a learner has no background at all, a short explanation may be kinder than a question. If they are in crisis before a deadline, a planning mode like Exam Prep Planner or a hint mode like Homework Coach may be better. If the goal is remembering terms, Flashcard Builder is more direct.
entries.value: Ní hé teagasc Sócraiteach an freagra i gcónaí. Mura bhfuil aon chúlra ag foghlaimeoir ar chor ar bith, b’fhéidir go mbeadh míniú gairid níos cineálta ná ceist. Má tá géarchéim acu roimh spriocdháta, b’fhéidir go mbeadh mód pleanála cosúil le Exam Prep Planner nó mód leide cosúil le Homework Coach níos fearr. Más é an sprioc téarmaí a mheabhrú, tá Flashcard Builder níos dírí.

entries.source: Socratic tutoring uses questions, hypotheses, hints, and reflection to build deeper understanding than passive answer reading.
entries.value: Úsáideann teagasc Sócraiteach ceisteanna, hipitéisí, leideanna, agus machnamh chun tuiscint níos doimhne a thógáil ná léamh freagraí éighníomhach.

entries.source: State the idea more clearly than at the start.
entries.value: Luaigh an smaoineamh níos soiléire ná mar a bhí ag an tús.

entries.source: That is the strength of Socratic learning. Instead of handing over the full answer immediately, the tutor asks a focused question. The learner makes a guess. The tutor tests that guess, offers a hint, and helps the learner notice what changed.
entries.value: Sin é neart na foghlama Sócraiteach. In ionad an freagra iomlán a thabhairt láithreach, cuireann an teagascóir ceist dhírithe. Déanann an foghlaimeoir buille faoi thuairim. Tástálann an teagascóir an buille sin, tairgeann sé leid, agus cabhraíonn sé leis an bhfoghlaimeoir a thabhairt faoi deara cad a d’athraigh.

entries.source: That is what inspir's Socratic Instruction mode is built for: one question at a time, with hints before answers and synthesis after genuine thinking.
entries.value: Sin é a bhfuil mód Socratic Instruction inspir tógtha dó: ceist amháin ag an am, le leideanna roimh fhreagraí agus sintéis tar éis fíorsmaointeoireachta.

entries.source: That is why a Socratic AI tutor can feel slower at first and more powerful later. It trades the comfort of a finished explanation for the evidence that the learner is actually building the idea.
entries.value: Sin é an fáth gur féidir le teagascóir IS Sócraiteach mothú níos moille ar dtús agus níos cumhachtaí níos déanaí. Malartaíonn sé compord míniú críochnaithe ar fhianaise go bhfuil an foghlaimeoir ag tógáil an smaoinimh i ndáiríre.

entries.source: That rhythm is especially useful for abstract topics: opportunity cost, causation in history, literary interpretation, ethical tradeoffs, proof, probability, and argument structure. It can also support practical work. A learner can use Debate Any Topic after a Socratic session to test whether their reasoning survives pressure.
entries.value: Tá an rithim sin thar a bheith úsáideach d’ábhair theibí: costas deise, cúisíocht sa stair, léirmhíniú liteartha, malairtí eiticiúla, cruthúnas, dóchúlacht, agus struchtúr argóinte. Is féidir léi tacú le hobair phraiticiúil freisin. Is féidir le foghlaimeoir Debate Any Topic a úsáid tar éis seisiúin Shócraitéigh chun a thástáil an seasann a réasúnaíocht faoi bhrú.

entries.source: The important constraint is restraint. A Socratic AI tutor should not dump the answer at the first sign of struggle. It should make effort easier to sustain.
entries.value: Is é an srian tábhachtach ná sriantacht. Níor chóir do theagascóir IS Sócraiteach an freagra a dhumpáil ag an gcéad chomhartha deacrachta. Ba chóir dó an iarracht a dhéanamh níos éasca le coinneáil.

entries.source: The last prompt matters. Socratic learning should end with synthesis. After the questions, the learner should be able to say what changed in their thinking.
entries.value: Tá an pras deireanach tábhachtach. Ba chóir go gcríochnódh foghlaim Shócraiteach le sintéis. Tar éis na gceisteanna, ba chóir don fhoghlaimeoir a bheith in ann a rá cad a d’athraigh ina smaointeoireacht.

entries.source: The point is not to make every lesson a puzzle. The point is to choose the right amount of struggle.
entries.value: Ní hé an pointe gach ceacht a dhéanamh ina phuzal. Is é an pointe an méid ceart streachailte a roghnú.

entries.source: The work happens in the learner's mind.
entries.value: Tarlaíonn an obair in intinn an fhoghlaimeora.

entries.source: Third, the tutor reads the answer. A useful AI tutor should not merely say "correct" or "incorrect." It should identify the claim, the assumption, the gap, or the misconception.
entries.value: Ar an tríú dul síos, léann an teagascóir an freagra. Níor chóir do theagascóir IS úsáideach a rá go simplí "ceart" nó "mícheart." Ba chóir dó an maíomh, an toimhde, an bhearna, nó an mhíthuiscint a aithint.

entries.source: Try it directly in Socratic Instruction. If you want a gentler explanation first, start with Learn Anything, then move into Socratic questions once you know the basic vocabulary.
entries.value: Bain triail as go díreach i Socratic Instruction. Más mian leat míniú níos séimhe ar dtús, tosaigh le Learn Anything, ansin bog isteach i gceisteanna Sócraiteacha nuair atá an bunfhoclóir ar eolas agat.

entries.source: Use these prompts in Socratic Instruction:
entries.value: Úsáid na prasaí seo in Socratic Instruction:

entries.source: What a good Socratic session looks like
entries.value: Cén chuma atá ar sheisiún maith Sócraiteach

entries.source: What do you think is happening?
entries.value: Cad a cheapann tú atá ag tarlú?

entries.source: What evidence supports that?
entries.value: Cén fhianaise a thacaíonn leis sin?

entries.source: What would change your mind?
entries.value: Cad a d’athródh d’intinn?

entries.source: When Socratic tutoring is the wrong tool
entries.value: Nuair is é teagasc Sócraiteach an uirlis mhícheart

entries.source: Where AI can help
entries.value: Áit ar féidir le IS cabhrú

entries.source: Which assumption is doing the most work?
entries.value: Cén toimhde atá ag déanamh an chuid is mó den obair?

entries.source: Why a Socratic AI tutor can make ideas stick
entries.value: Cén fáth gur féidir le teagascóir Sócraiteach IS smaointe a dhaingniú

entries.source: Why questions help
entries.value: Cén fáth a gcabhraíonn ceisteanna

entries.source: You know a Socratic AI tutor worked when the learner can do three things:
entries.value: Tá a fhios agat gur oibrigh teagascóir Sócraiteach IS nuair is féidir leis an bhfoghlaimeoir trí rud a dhéanamh:
